vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear
Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
Actuation role: Motor pod / pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)

risk.desc: Potential for hidden interfaces within monolithic structures complicating service access.
risk.mit: Integrate parts only where service access remains visible and inspectable.

risk.desc: Threaded connections may not have sufficient engagement length into soft materials.
risk.mit: Use inserts or bosses with adequate engagement depth for threaded connections.

risk.desc: Insufficient documentation for inspection and verification processes.
risk.mit: Ensure all inspection and verification steps are clearly documented and traceable.

risk.desc: Risk of overestimating manufacturing capabilities leading to design flaws.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough process readiness reviews before finalizing designs.

risk.desc: Inadequate representation of fastener patterns and mating clearances.
risk.mit: Explicitly represent all fastener patterns and mating clearances in geometry.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on the wing spar due to uneven heat distribution.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling fins or adjust the material composition to improve heat dissipation.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wing to fuselage.
Heat dissipation from wing spar to cooling fins.
Transmits engine power to propeller via shaft.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection and CMM for critical features

verification_focus.description: Verify mass estimation against CAD model.
Validate structural integrity under expected loads.
Ensure adequate heat dissipation from electronics.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion coefficient matching materials or incorporate thermal expansion joints

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly due to complex mating surfaces
risk.mit: Implement alignment pins and visual guides for assembly

risk.desc: Control surface movement may be restricted if hinge clearance is too tight
risk.mit: Ensure proper clearance and lubrication of hinge components

risk.desc: Lightening pockets may compromise structural integrity if not properly reinforced
risk.mit: Add reinforcing ribs or plates around lightening pockets

risk.desc: Leading edge sock may experience aerodynamic stress concentration points
risk.mit: Smooth out sharp edges and corners in the leading edge design

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Servo pockets, control horns, pushrod/linkage channels
physics_paths: Load path: MG90S or DS215MG servo load transferred to wing structure via servo pocket and control horn
Flow path: Control signals from flight controller to servo via connector_mate
Thermal path: Heat dissipation from servo to surrounding air via fins on servo and open access cover
integration_opportunities: Optimize servo pocket shape for better heat dissipation
Add more strain relief points for longer cables
Improve control horn socket for smoother rotation
verification_focus: Mass check: Ensure total mass does not exceed 150g
Mechanical test: Verify control horn snap-fit strength
Electrical test: Confirm harness passthrough integrity
